title: Essential Housewares - 25 Dinner Candles - White - 6-7 Hour Burn Time
features: Elegant and Timeless Design: Classic white dinner candles add sophistication to any setting, perfect for formal and casual occasions.
Long-Lasting Burn: Enjoy up to 6 hours of consistent, clean burning, ideal for extended dinners, weddings, or events.
Versatile Use: Fits most standard candle holders, making them suitable for dinner parties, everyday meals, and special celebrations.
Create Warm Ambiance: Enhance your dining experience with a cozy, inviting glow that sets the perfect mood for any occasion.
Premium Quality: Made from high-quality materials to ensure a steady flame for a flawless presentation.
description: Product Description Non Smoke Non Drip 100% Parafin Pack Size: 25 Burning Time: 7 Hours Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not leave unattended. Monitor burn time. Extinguish before leaving the room or going to sleep. Never burn for more than 4 hours at a time. Place on a heat-resistant surface. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Dispose of candle remnants responsibly.
